content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (May 23, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on May 23, 2026, focused on expanding Eliza Cloud capabilities and resolving critical production infrastructure issues. Key achievements include porting the Sol/Steward cloud bridge and fixing a P0 KMS error affecting SIWE signups. Additionally, a significant volume of new work was initiated to enhance OS release verification, SLSA build provenance, and infrastructure security.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Cloud Infrastructure & Integration**
*   Ported Sol/Steward Eliza Cloud bridge work to the `develop` branch, enabling JWT minting and Steward plugin installation for Sol ([#7894](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7894)).
*   Resolved a P0 production incident where SIWE signups were failing due to a `KmsError` by implementing a persistent root key for the KMS local-backend ([#7920](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7920)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **OS Release & Security:**
    *   [#7909](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7909): Add `VERIFY.md` and `verify-release.sh` helper.
    *   [#7908](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7908): Attest SLSA build provenance over SHA256SUMS.
    *   [#7907](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7907): Mint SLSA build provenance attestation for VM image.
    *   [#7906](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7906): Mint SLSA build provenance attestation for .deb.
    *   [#7905](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7905): Mint SLSA build provenance attestation for ISO.
    *   [#7904](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7904): Invoke lintian on produced .deb packages.
    *   [#7903](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7903): Tier ISO boot smoke tests against service markers.
    *   [#7902](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7902): Attach SPDX SBOM to Linux ISO releases.
    *   [#7901](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7901): Enforce 3 GiB ISO size budget.
    *   [#7900](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7900): Aggregate SHA256SUMS across full-release artifacts.
*   **Cloud & Core Improvements:**
    *   [#7899](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7899): Replace HTTP control-plane health probe with Redis heartbeat.
    *   [#7898](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7898): Align `test_software_bsp_evidence` with `check_software_bsp`.
    *   [#7897](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7897): Restore evaluator messageToUser precedence and opt-in canonical tool text.
    *   [#7896](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7896): Rebrand-ready agent base domain configuration.
    *   [#7895](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7895): Preserve speaker names in prior dialogue context.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
